audience: Website owners and SMEs that want to prevent data loss and reduce recovery time after a WordPress incident.
primaryDutchSearchIntent: Uitleggen hoe een KMO een volledige en herstelbare WordPress-back-upstrategie opzet.

searchIntent.question: How do I create a complete WordPress backup and verify that I can restore the website?
searchIntent.geographicContext: International English-speaking readers, with VisualVibe serving businesses from Limburg, Belgium.

longTailKeywords: how to back up a WordPress website
how often to back up WordPress
directAnswer: A complete WordPress backup stores both the website files and database away from the live server, keeps several restore points and is tested regularly in a safe environment. Its schedule should reflect how much new work or customer data the organisation can afford to lose.
title: How to back up WordPress: build a recovery-ready backup strategy
metaDescription: Learn how to back up WordPress: what files and database data to save, where to store copies, how often to run backups and why restore tests matter.
h1: How to back up WordPress: build a recovery-ready backup strategy
factsToPreserve: A complete recovery copy requires both files and the database.
At least one backup should be kept outside the live hosting environment.
Backup frequency depends on how much changing data the organisation can afford to lose.
Recent backups may already contain an infection or unnoticed fault, so several retention periods are needed.
A successful restore test is the only reliable proof that a backup is usable.
Backups may contain personal data and require access controls, retention and potentially anonymisation in test environments.
